UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a client's profile in the EZ Bus application, used for booking and managing tickets.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user.

address.description: The physical address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (passenger, operator, ADMIN, or COMPANY).

companyId.description: Reference to the transport company if the user is a COMPANY or operator.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

TransportCompany.title: TransportCompany
TransportCompany.description: Represents a bus transport company operating on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TransportCompany entity.

name.description: The official name of the transport company.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the transport company.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the transport company.

address.description: The physical address of the transport company headquarters.

description.description: A brief description of the transport company.

logoUrl.description: URL to the transport company's logo image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transport company profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transport company profile was last updated.

BusPark.title: BusPark
BusPark.description: Represents a bus park or station in Rwanda where buses depart from or arrive at.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BusPark entity.

name.description: The name of the bus park (e.g., Nyabugogo Bus Park).

locationDescription.description: A more detailed description of the bus park's location.

address.description: The street address or general area of the bus park.

city.description: The city or major town where the bus park is located (e.g., Kigali, Rubavu).

latitude.description: Geographical latitude of the bus park (optional).

longitude.description: Geographical longitude of the bus park (optional).

Location.title: Location
Location.description: Represents a Rwandan city, town, or significant geographical point that can serve as an origin or destination.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Location entity.

name.description: The name of the location (e.g., Kigali, Rubavu, Musanze).

province.description: The province in Rwanda where the location is situated (e.g., Kigali City, Western Province).

country.description: The country where the location is (default: Rwanda).

Bus.title: Bus
Bus.description: Represents a specific bus vehicle owned by a transport company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bus entity.

registrationNumber.description: The unique registration plate number of the bus.

capacity.description: The total number of seats available on the bus.

transportCompanyId.description: Reference to the TransportCompany that owns this bus. (Relationship: TransportCompany 1:N Bus)

model.description: The make and model of the bus (e.g., Mercedes-Benz, Higer).

features.description: A list of features available on the bus (e.g., 'AC', 'Wi-Fi', 'USB Charging').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the bus record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the bus record was last updated.

Route.title: Route
Route.description: Defines a conceptual bus route between two locations, independent of specific times or companies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Route entity.

originLocationId.description: Reference to the originating Location for this route. (Relationship: Location 1:N Route)

destinationLocationId.description: Reference to the destination Location for this route. (Relationship: Location 1:N Route)

description.description: A textual description of the route (e.g., 'Kigali to Rubavu Direct').

companyId.description: The transport company that owns or primarily operates this route record.

Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: Represents a specific bus journey instance on a given route, operated by a specific bus and company at a particular time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Trip entity.

routeId.description: Reference to the Route this trip follows.

busId.description: Reference to the specific Bus vehicle.

busName.description: Display name of the bus or company.

busType.description: The category of the bus (e.g., Luxury, Executive).

registrationNumber.description: The plate number of the vehicle.

capacity.description: Total seat capacity of the vehicle.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a confirmed reservation for one or more seats on a specific bus trip.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Booking entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the booking. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Booking)

tripId.description: Reference to the Trip for which seats are booked. (Relationship: Trip 1:N Booking)

bookedSeatNumbers.description: A list of specific seat numbers booked in this transaction.

bookingDate.description: The date and time when the booking was made.

totalPrice.description: The total monetary amount for this booking.

status.description: The current status of the booking (e.g., 'Pending Payment', 'Confirmed', 'Cancelled', 'Refunded').

paymentId.description: Reference to the Payment associated with this booking, if payment is completed. (Relationship: Payment 1:1 Booking)

qrCodeData.description: The data string to be encoded into a QR code for ticket verification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was last updated.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records details of a payment transaction made for a booking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

bookingId.description: Reference to the Booking associated with this payment. (Relationship: Booking 1:1 Payment)

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment (e.g., 'Mobile Money', 'Credit Card', 'Cash').

transactionId.description: The unique transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway.

paymentDate.description: The date and time when the payment was completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was last updated.

Advertisement.title: Advertisement
Advertisement.description: Represents an advertisement slot for companies, potentially for transport-related services or general promotions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Advertisement entity.

companyId.description: Reference to the TransportCompany placing the advertisement. (Relationship: TransportCompany 1:N Advertisement)

title.description: The title or headline of the advertisement.

description.description: A brief description or body text for the advertisement.

imageUrl.description: URL to the image asset for the advertisement.

targetUrl.description: The URL where users will be directed upon clicking the advertisement.

startDate.description: The date when the advertisement campaign begins.

endDate.description: The date when the advertisement campaign ends.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the advertisement is currently active and should be displayed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the advertisement record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the advertisement record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores bookings made by a specific user.
Records payment details for a specific booking.
Stores specific bus vehicles owned by a transport company.
Stores advertisements placed by a transport company.
Stores static information about bus parks in Rwanda.
Stores static information about Rwandan destinations/locations.
Defines conceptual bus routes between locations.
Dedicated collection for identifying platform administrators.
Dedicated collection for identifying administrators of specific transport companies.
